This insurance policy complies with all additional Tesoro Hawaii Refinery (Kapolei) requirements. This certificate may be required, please reference your contract and/or your Tesoro contracts representative. 

"Tesoro Hawaii Corporation" is named as Additional Insured. The address MUST be either: 

19100 Ridgewood Parkway TX1-032 

San Antonio, TX 78259 

OR 

91-325 Komohana St. 

Kapolei, HI 96707 

A waiver of subrogation endorsement is included.
Upload a Certificate of Insurance or other supporting documentation for this policy. \nInsurance Requirements
